methods.boolean contains(int left, int top, int: Returns true iff the 4 specified sides of a rectangle are inside or equal to this rectangle.
methods.boolean contains(Rect r): Returns true iff the specified rectangle r is inside or equal to this rectangle.
methods.boolean contains(int x, int y): Returns true if (x, y) is inside the rectangle.
methods.boolean equals(Object o): Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
methods.String flattenToString(): Return a string representation of the rectangle in a well-defined format.
methods.int hashCode(): Returns a hash code value for the object.
methods.void inset(int left, int top, int right,: Insets the rectangle on all sides specified by the insets.
methods.void inset(Insets insets): Insets the rectangle on all sides specified by the dimensions of insets.
methods.boolean intersect(int left, int top, int: If the rectangle specified by left, top, right, bottom intersects this rectangle, return true and set this rectangle to that intersection, otherwise return false and do not change this rectangle.
methods.boolean intersect(Rect r): If the specified rectangle intersects this rectangle, return true and set this rectangle to that intersection, otherwise return false and do not change this rectangle.
methods.boolean intersects(int left, int top, in: Returns true if this rectangle intersects the specified rectangle.
methods.boolean intersects(Rect a, Rect b): Returns true iff the two specified rectangles intersect.
methods.boolean isEmpty(): Returns true if the rectangle is empty (left >= right or top >= bottom)
methods.void offset(int dx, int dy): Offset the rectangle by adding dx to its left and right coordinates, and adding dy to its top and bottom coordinates.
methods.void offsetTo(int newLeft, int newTop): Offset the rectangle to a specific (left, top) position, keeping its width and height the same.
methods.void readFromParcel(Parcel in): Set the rectangle's coordinates from the data stored in the specified parcel.
methods.void set(int left, int top, int right, i: Set the rectangle's coordinates to the specified values.
methods.void set(Rect src): Copy the coordinates from src into this rectangle.
methods.boolean setIntersect(Rect a, Rect b): If rectangles a and b intersect, return true and set this rectangle to that intersection, otherwise return false and do not change this rectangle.
methods.void sort(): Swap top/bottom or left/right if there are flipped (i.e.
methods.String toShortString(): Return a string representation of the rectangle in a compact form.
methods.String toString(): Returns a string representation of the object.
methods.Rect unflattenFromString(String str): Returns a Rect from a string of the form returned by flattenToString(), or null if the string is not of that form.
methods.void union(int left, int top, int right,: Update this Rect to enclose itself and the specified rectangle.
methods.void union(Rect r): Update this Rect to enclose itself and the specified rectangle.
methods.void union(int x, int y): Update this Rect to enclose itself and the [x, y] coordinate.
methods.void writeToParcel(Parcel out, int flags: Write this rectangle to the specified parcel.
